message:
Add custom comparators for sort function

The sort() function now accepts an optional cmp parameter that takes
a binary lambda to customize how list elements are compared and
ordered. This allows users to define complex sorting logic for lists
of records by providing a comparison lambda that receives two adjacent
elements and returns a boolean indicating their relative order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+---
+title: Enhance `sort` function with `order` and `cmp` parameters
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+pr: 5767
+created: 2026-02-17T06:37:14.758079Z
+---
+
+The `sort` function now supports two new parameters: `order` for controlling
+sort direction and `cmp` for custom comparison logic via binary lambdas.
+
+**Sort in descending order:**
+
+```tql
+from {xs: [3, 1, 2]}
+select ys = sort(xs, order="desc")
+```
+
+```tql
+{ys: [3, 2, 1]}
+```
+
+**Sort records by a specific field using a custom comparator:**
+
+```tql
+from {xs: [{v: 2, id: "b"}, {v: 1, id: "a"}, {v: 2, id: "c"}]}
+select ys = sort(xs, cmp=(left, right) => left.v < right.v)
+```
+
+```tql
+{
+  ys: [
+    {v: 1, id: "a"},
+    {v: 2, id: "b"},
+    {v: 2, id: "c"},
+  ],
+}
+```
+
+The `cmp` lambda receives two elements and returns a boolean indicating whether
+the first element should come before the second. Both parameters can be combined
+to reverse a custom comparison.

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+---
+error: true
+---
+
+from {xs: [1, 2, 3]}
+select ys = xs.where((left, right) => left > right)

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: expected unary lambda for `where`
+ --> tests/functions/sort/binary_lambda_rejected_elsewhere.tql:6:23
+  |
+6 | select ys = xs.where((left, right) => left > right)
+  |                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = hint: binary lambdas are only supported for `sort(..., cmp=...)`

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+---
+error: true
+---
+
+from {xs: [3, 1, 2]}
+select ys = sort(xs, cmp=x => x < x)

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: `cmp` must be a binary lambda
+ --> tests/functions/sort/cmp_requires_binary_lambda.tql:6:26
+  |
+6 | select ys = sort(xs, cmp=x => x < x)
+  |                          ^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = hint: provide `cmp=(left, right) => ...`
